name: Tonnage Tax Exclusion for Qualifying Shipping Activities

eligibility.description: Must be a qualifying corporation making a valid election under the tonnage tax regime for its shipping activities.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an electing corporation to exclude all income from qualifying shipping activities from gross income, replacing the regular corporate income tax with a tax based on the tonnage of the vessels.
